metadata.title: CUNPOLLO - Chicken that Saves Your Day
metadata.description: Fresh, delicious, and fast roasted chicken with the largest kids' play area in Cancún. Check our menu, location, and hours.

hero.title: Chicken that Saves Your Day
hero.subtitle: Fresh, delicious, and fast chicken with all the sides. Every bite is a treat you'll want to repeat.

video.title: This Is How We Make Your Chicken
video.subtitle: Fresh, roasted on the spot with flavor you'll love

terms.generalText: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the website cunpollo.com (hereinafter, the "Site") and the online ordering services offered by CUNPOLLO, located at Av. Rodrigo Gómez, SM 13, Mza 1, Lote 6, Cancún, Quintana Roo, C.P. 77500, Mexico. By accessing and using this Site, you accept these terms in their entirety. If you do not agree, please refrain from using the Site.
terms.serviceText: CUNPOLLO offers the following services through its Site:
terms.service1: Browse the menu of available food products
terms.service2: Online orders for in-store pickup ("Pay & Pick Up" mode)
terms.service3: Online payment via credit or debit card
terms.ordersText: By placing an order through the Site, you declare that:
terms.orders1: You are 18 years of age or older, or have authorization from a legal guardian
terms.orders2: The information provided is truthful and complete
terms.orders3: You are the cardholder or an authorized user of the payment card used
terms.orders4: You will pick up the order at the store within a reasonable time (maximum 1 hour after the order ready notification)
terms.paymentsText: Online payments are processed through Openpay, an authorized payment platform regulated under applicable Mexican laws.
terms.payments1: Prices shown on the Site are in Mexican Pesos (MXN) and include Value Added Tax (IVA)
terms.payments2: CUNPOLLO reserves the right to modify prices without prior notice. The applicable prices will be those in effect at the time the order is confirmed
terms.payments3: Your card data is tokenized by Openpay and is never stored or processed directly by CUNPOLLO, complying with PCI DSS standards
terms.cancellationsText: Orders may only be canceled before preparation begins. Once the order is being prepared, it cannot be canceled. If your order has any quality issues, you may report it directly at the store or by calling +52 998 148 8987. Applicable refunds will be processed in accordance with the Federal Consumer Protection Law of Mexico.
terms.liabilityText: CUNPOLLO shall not be liable for service interruptions on the Site due to technical failures, maintenance, or force majeure. We are committed to making our best effort to keep the Site available and functioning properly. Estimated preparation times are approximate and may vary depending on demand.
terms.ipText: All content on the Site, including but not limited to logos, images, text, graphic design, and source code, is the property of CUNPOLLO and is protected by the Federal Copyright Law and the Industrial Property Law of Mexico. Its reproduction, distribution, or use without prior written authorization is prohibited.
terms.modificationsText: CUNPOLLO reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Modifications will take effect upon publication on the Site. Continued use of the Site after the publication of changes constitutes acceptance thereof.
terms.jurisdictionText: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the United Mexican States. For their interpretation and enforcement, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in the city of Cancún, Quintana Roo, Mexico, waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them by reason of present or future domicile.
terms.contactText: For any questions or clarifications regarding these Terms and Conditions, you may contact us at:

privacy.responsibleText: In compliance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP) and its Regulations, CUNPOLLO is responsible for the processing of your personal data. Our contact information is:
privacy.dataCollectedText: To provide our services, we collect the following personal data:
privacy.data4: Browsing data (cookies, IP address, device type)
privacy.dataCardNote: Important: Bank card data (number, expiration date, CVV) is processed exclusively by Openpay, our PCI DSS certified payment processor. CUNPOLLO never stores, processes, or has access to your complete card data.
privacy.purposeText: Your personal data will be used for the following primary purposes, necessary for the provision of our services:
privacy.purpose1: Process and manage your online orders
privacy.purpose2: Send notifications about your order status via WhatsApp
privacy.purpose3: Process payments through our payment platform
privacy.purpose4: Contact you in case of any issues with your order
privacy.transferText: Your personal data may be transferred to the following third parties without your consent, in accordance with Article 37 of the LFPDPPP:
privacy.transfer1: Openpay (Grupo KIO Networks, S.A. de C.V.) — for credit/debit card payment processing
privacy.transfer2: Twilio Inc. — for sending WhatsApp notifications about your order status
privacy.arcoText: You have the right to Access, Rectify, Cancel, or Oppose the processing of your personal data (ARCO Rights). To exercise these rights, you may send a request to contacto@cunpollo.com or visit our premises in person. Your request must include: full name, a clear description of the data for which you wish to exercise any ARCO right, and any document that facilitates the location of your data. CUNPOLLO will respond to your request within a maximum of 20 business days, as established in the LFPDPPP.
privacy.cookiesText: The Site uses strictly necessary cookies for the shopping cart and administrator session functionality. We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies for marketing purposes. Openpay session cookies are used exclusively for fraud prevention during the payment process.
privacy.securityText: CUNPOLLO implements administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your personal data against damage, loss, alteration, destruction, or unauthorized use. The Site has an SSL certificate (TLS 1.2+) for data encryption in transit. Payments are processed through tokenization via Openpay, ensuring that sensitive card data never passes through our servers.
privacy.changesText: CUNPOLLO reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Modifications will be published on this same page of the Site. We recommend that you periodically review this notice to stay informed about how we protect your information.
privacy.authorityText: If you believe that your right to personal data protection has been violated, you may contact the National Institute of Transparency, Access to Information and Personal Data Protection (INAI). For more information, visit www.inai.org.mx.
privacy.consentText: By providing your personal data through our Site and using our online ordering services, you grant your consent for the processing of your data as established in this Privacy Policy.

chat.title: CunPollo Assistant
chat.subtitle: Chicken that saves your day
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm CunPollo's assistant. I can help you with the menu, prices, promotions, or add products to your cart. What are you craving?
